message:
fix(web): use Cx::for_request() instead of Cx::for_testing() in handlers

Async handler adapters (AsyncHandlerFn, AsyncHandlerFn1) were creating
Cx::for_testing() contexts, which lack production configuration like
budget tracking and region bindings. Changed to Cx::for_request() which
provides a properly scoped context for HTTP request handling.

Also syncs .beads/issues.jsonl.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
